steps.title: The protocol begins by transferring (up to
steps.instruction: The protocol begins by transferring (up to

steps.title: samples from row A in slot...
steps.instruction: samples from row A in slot 2 to A1, A3, A5, C1 and C3 (in that order) in slot 5, containing dilution buffer.

steps.title: Once all samples are transferred to...
steps.instruction: Once all samples are transferred to dilution buffer, *total volume of samples* will be added from slot 5 to Visby. --- To purchase tips, reagents, or pipettes, please visit our [online store](https://shop.opentrons.com/) or contact our sales team at [info@opentrons.com](mailto:info@opentrons.com) * [Opentrons OT-2](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-robot/products/ot-2) * [Opentrons OT-2 Run App (Version 4.0.0 or later)](https://opentrons.com/ot-app/) * [P1000 Single-Channel GEN2](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons 1000µL Filter Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-1000ul-filter-tips) * [Visby Device with Adapter](https://www.visbymedical.com/covid-19-test/) * Custom Tube Rack with 12mL Tubes --- **Deck Layout** **Slot 1**: [Opentrons 1000µL Filter Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-1000ul-filter-tips) **Slot 2**: Custom Tube Rack with 12mL Tubes, containing samples in row A **Slot 5**: Custom Tube Rack with 12mL Tubes, cotaining dilution buffer in A1, A3, A5, C1, and C3 (depending on the number of samples) **Slot 7**: [Visby 3](https://www.visbymedical.com/covid-19-test/) **Slot 8**: [Visby 4](https://www.visbymedical.com/covid-19-test/) **Slot 9**: [Visby 5](https://www.visbymedical.com/covid-19-test/) **Slot 10**: [Visby 1](https://www.visbymedical.com/covid-19-test/) **Slot 11**: [Visby 2](https://www.visbymedical.com/covid-19-test/) Explanation

steps.title: Download your protocol and unzip if needed
steps.instruction: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
